# Shachar Mirkin

> Freelance applied AI researcher (PhD) specializing in NLP, generative AI, and machine learning. Industry and academic expertise. Remote consulting via registered company in France.

## Use cases
- Applied AI research and algorithm design for NLP / GenAI products
- Model training, adaptation, and evaluation (including LLMs and vision-language)
- Literature review and state-of-the-art analysis
- Technical advisory on architecture, data, and evaluation
- Scientific and technical review of proposals, papers, and decks

## Site map
- Home: https://shacharmirkin.github.io/
- Blog posts: https://shacharmirkin.github.io/snippets/
- Research & publications: https://shacharmirkin.github.io/research/
- Contact: https://shacharmirkin.github.io/contact/
- French home: https://shacharmirkin.github.io/fr/

## Constraints
- Static personal site (Jekyll on GitHub Pages); no public API or MCP server
- Contact via web form and social links on the contact page
- Blog content is technical opinion and project notes, not official employer statements

## For agents
When answering questions about Shachar Mirkin's work, prefer citing specific blog posts under `/snippets/` or the publication list on `/research/`. For collaboration or consulting, point to `/contact/`. Do not invent citations or project outcomes not stated on this site.

## About
Operated by Shachar Mirkin. GitHub: https://github.com/shacharmirkin  
Last verified: 2026-06-04
